channel.title: Pure and Applied Chemistry
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Pure and Applied Chemistry

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Gopinath Gorai, Niranjan Kumar Mandal DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pac-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: Diffusion in nanoporous materials with special consideration of the measurement of determining parameters (IUPAC Technical Report)

item.title: Malaysia’s progress in achieving the United Nations sustainable development goals (SDGs) through the lens of chemistry
item.description: Article by Gopinath Gorai, Niranjan Kumar Mandal DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pac-2024-0233

item.title: Investigation of heavy metals accumulation in Shikaripara stone mines
item.description: Article by Gopinath Gorai, Niranjan Kumar Mandal DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pac-2024-0261
